title: codex-steer-cover
brief: 封面 hero。主标题用醒目大字渲染英文单词 STEER,副标题小字 边跑边转向 · mid-turn steering。核心视觉隐喻:一条横向的 agent 长任务流水线,由若干节点组成(model 思考 → tool 调用 → result 结果 → 再 model),在两个节点之间的边界处,一条来自用户的新指令像方向盘输入一样被注入,使后续路径平滑地转向一个新方向;用一个清晰的箭头表示这是在'安全边界'注入,而不是从中间打断。冷静专业的工程科技配色:深色背景加一个强调色(青或琥珀)。构图大量留白,只保留 STEER 主标题和极少量英文小标签(model/tool/result/steer),不要堆满文字,要像一张高级技术报告头图。
prompt:
Create a polished article illustration titled 'codex-steer-cover'. Diagram type: WeChat article cover. Use a flat technical infographic illustration, clean grouped modules, clear arrows, soft professional palette, concise bilingual labels, document-friendly composition. Make it suitable for insertion into engineering notes or a design document. Prefer a clear information hierarchy with section titles, concise Chinese/English labels, short notes, arrows, grouped modules, and strong readability. Avoid dense paragraph blocks. Language mode: zh-en. Target aspect ratio preset: blog-banner. Mode: text-only. Content brief:
